# Node Interface - Physical

## Filter by internal vlan

Example: single vlan

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.vlan:iserver.output.default
```

Example: multiple vlans

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.vlans:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.vlan:devel.debug
```
